requirement_topic.en: IEC 62619 Safety Requirements — Cell and Module Safety Baseline for Gambia BESS Project Acceptance
requirement_topic.zh: IEC 62619安全要求——冈比亚BESS项目验收的电芯和模组安全基准
requirement_topic.zht: IEC 62619安全要求——甘比亞BESS項目驗收的電芯和模組安全基準

summary.en: Gambia does not currently have a confirmed standalone mandatory BESS product safety regulation referencing IEC 62619. The Gambia Standards Bureau (TGSB — The Gambia Standards Bureau, not a separate TGSB abbreviation) is the national standards body responsible for product conformity certification and standards adoption. TGSB's specific role in mandatory BESS product conformity certification — including whether it issues conformity certificates referencing IEC 62619 as a mandatory pre-import requirement — had not been confirmed from publicly accessible official sources as of the dataset date. Notwithstanding the regulatory uncertainty, IEC 62619 (Safety Requirements for Secondary Lithium Cells and Batteries for Use in Industrial Applications) is the internationally expected safety standard for lithium BESS cells and modules, and Gambia donor-project specifications (ECOWAS ROGEP, World Bank, UNDP off-grid electrification programmes), project-owner technical requirements, and lender due diligence processes reference IEC 62619 compliance as a technical prerequisite for project acceptance. Exporters should verify the current TGSB regulated-product scope and PURA licence safety submission requirements directly before shipment.
summary.zh: 冈比亚目前尚无经确认的引用IEC 62619的独立强制性BESS产品安全法规。冈比亚标准局（TGSB——冈比亚标准局，非另一TGSB缩写）是负责产品合格评定和标准采纳的国家标准机构。TGSB在强制性BESS产品合格评定中的具体角色——包括其是否签发以IEC 62619为强制性进口前要求的合格证书——截至本数据集日期尚未从可公开获取的官方来源得到确认。尽管存在监管不确定性，IEC 62619（工业应用二次锂电芯和电池安全要求）仍是锂BESS电芯和模组的国际预期安全标准，冈比亚捐助方项目规格（ECOWAS ROGEP、世界银行、联合国开发计划署离网电气化项目）、项目业主技术要求及贷款方尽职调查流程均以IEC 62619合规作为项目验收的技术前提。出口商在出货前应直接向TGSB核实现行受监管产品范围及PURA许可证安全提交要求。
summary.zht: 甘比亞目前尚無經確認的引用IEC 62619的獨立強制性BESS產品安全法規。甘比亞標準局（TGSB——甘比亞標準局，非另一TGSB縮寫）是負責產品合格評定和標準採納的國家標準機構。TGSB在強制性BESS產品合格評定中的具體角色——包括其是否簽發以IEC 62619為強制性進口前要求的合格證書——截至本數據集日期尚未從可公開獲取的官方來源得到確認。儘管存在監管不確定性，IEC 62619（工業應用二次鋰電芯和電池安全要求）仍是鋰BESS電芯和模組的國際預期安全標準，甘比亞捐助方項目規格（ECOWAS ROGEP、世界銀行、聯合國開發計劃署離網電氣化項目）、項目業主技術要求及貸款方盡職調查流程均以IEC 62619合規作為項目驗收的技術前提。出口商在出貨前應直接向TGSB核實現行受監管產品範圍及PURA許可證安全提交要求。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62619:2022 — Safety Requirements for Secondary Lithium Cells and Batteries for Use in Industrial Applications (internationally expected baseline for BESS cell/module safety in Gambia donor-project specifications)

IEC 62933-5-1:2024 — Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Safety considerations — Hazard identification, risk assessment and risk mitigation (system-level safety expected in donor-project specifications)
TGSB (The Gambia Standards Bureau) — national standards body; BESS-specific mandatory conformity certification role unconfirmed as of dataset date — verify directly with TGSB
PURA (Public Utilities Regulatory Authority) — BESS operating-licence safety submission requirements unconfirmed as of dataset date — verify directly with PURA

summary.en: China's primary mandatory standard for BESS cells from August 2025 is GB 44240-2024 (Secondary Lithium Cells and Batteries Used in Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Safety Requirements), which replaces the prior GB/T 36276 series as the mandatory safety baseline for large-format BESS batteries over 100 kWh. The prior voluntary standard GB/T 36276-2023 (Lithium-Ion Batteries for Electrical Energy Storage) provides the technical framework for cells, modules, and battery clusters used in EES. These Chinese standards are not accepted as equivalents to IEC 62619 in Gambia donor-project specifications or TGSB conformity requirements. Exporters must obtain IEC 62619 test evidence from an ILAC-accredited laboratory in addition to any Chinese GB compliance.
summary.zh: 自2025年8月起，中国BESS电芯的主要强制性标准为GB 44240-2024（电化学储能系统用二次锂电池安全要求），取代原GB/T 36276系列，成为100 kWh以上大型BESS电池的强制性安全基准。此前的自愿性标准GB/T 36276-2023（电化学储能用锂离子电池）为EES中使用的电芯、模组和电池簇提供技术框架。上述中国标准不被冈比亚捐助方项目规格或TGSB合格评定要求接受为IEC 62619的等效依据。出口商除中国GB合规外，还须从ILAC认可实验室取得IEC 62619测试证据。
summary.zht: 自2025年8月起，中國BESS電芯的主要強制性標準為GB 44240-2024（電化學儲能系統用二次鋰電池安全要求），取代原GB/T 36276系列，成為100 kWh以上大型BESS電池的強制性安全基準。此前的自願性標準GB/T 36276-2023（電化學儲能用鋰離子電池）為EES中使用的電芯、模組和電池簇提供技術框架。上述中國標準不被甘比亞捐助方項目規格或TGSB合格評定要求接受為IEC 62619的等效依據。出口商除中國GB合規外，還須從ILAC認可實驗室取得IEC 62619測試證據。

standards_or_laws: GB 44240-2024 — 电化学储能系统用二次锂电池安全要求 (Secondary Lithium Cells and Batteries Used in Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Safety Requirements; mandatory, effective August 1, 2025)
GB/T 36276-2023 — 电力储能用锂离子电池 (Lithium-Ion Batteries for Electrical Energy Storage; voluntary, effective July 1, 2024)

gap.en: Critical gap: Gambia donor-project specifications and lender due diligence reference IEC 62619 as the expected safety evidence for BESS cells and modules. Chinese GB 44240-2024 and GB/T 36276-2023 are not harmonised with IEC 62619 and are not accepted as substitutes in project technical specifications. Exporters should: (a) verify the current TGSB regulated-product scope for any mandatory pre-import conformity certification obligation for BESS cells or systems; (b) obtain IEC 62619 type-test certificates from an ILAC-accredited laboratory for cells and modules supplied to Gambia BESS projects; (c) confirm the applicable IEC 62619 edition referenced in the project specification or PURA licence conditions before committing to a test programme; (d) prepare a BESS Safety Management Plan aligned with IEC 62933-5-1 hazard identification and risk mitigation requirements for PURA licence submission.
gap.zh: 关键差距：冈比亚捐助方项目规格和贷款方尽职调查将IEC 62619作为BESS电芯和模组的预期安全证据。中国GB 44240-2024和GB/T 36276-2023未与IEC 62619协调，不被项目技术规格接受为替代依据。出口商应：（a）核实现行TGSB受监管产品范围，确认BESS电芯或系统是否存在强制进口前合格评定义务；（b）从ILAC认可实验室取得供应至冈比亚BESS项目的电芯和模组的IEC 62619型式试验证书；（c）在启动测试计划前确认项目规格或PURA许可证条件中引用的IEC 62619版本；（d）准备符合IEC 62933-5-1危害识别和风险缓解要求的BESS安全管理计划，用于PURA许可证提交。
gap.zht: 關鍵差距：甘比亞捐助方項目規格和貸款方盡職調查將IEC 62619作為BESS電芯和模組的預期安全證據。中國GB 44240-2024和GB/T 36276-2023未與IEC 62619協調，不被項目技術規格接受為替代依據。出口商應：（a）核實現行TGSB受監管產品範圍，確認BESS電芯或系統是否存在強制進口前合格評定義務；（b）從ILAC認可實驗室取得供應至甘比亞BESS項目的電芯和模組的IEC 62619型式試驗證書；（c）在啟動測試計劃前確認項目規格或PURA許可證條件中引用的IEC 62619版本；（d）準備符合IEC 62933-5-1危害識別和風險緩解要求的BESS安全管理計劃，用於PURA許可證提交。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory in project practice where donor-project specifications or PURA licence conditions require IEC 62619 compliance; TGSB mandatory regulatory obligation for BESS cells has not been confirmed from official sources as of dataset date — verify directly with TGSB and PURA
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — GB 44240-2024 is a mandatory national standard (GB designation) for lithium BESS cells over 100 kWh, effective August 1, 2025; GB/T 36276-2023 is voluntary

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] No confirmed standalone mandatory BESS product safety regulation referencing IEC 62619 has been identified for Gambia as of the dataset date; however, IEC 62619 is the internationally expected technical baseline for BESS cell and module safety in Gambia donor-project specifications and lender due diligence. Chinese GB 44240-2024 and GB/T 36276-2023 certification alone is not sufficient for Gambia project acceptance. Verify TGSB current regulated-product scope and PURA licence safety requirements; obtain IEC 62619 type-test evidence from an ILAC-accredited laboratory before shipment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 截至本数据集日期，冈比亚尚无经确认的引用IEC 62619的独立强制性BESS产品安全法规；然而，IEC 62619是冈比亚捐助方项目规格和贷款方尽职调查中BESS电芯和模组安全的国际预期技术基准。仅持有中国GB 44240-2024和GB/T 36276-2023认证不足以满足冈比亚项目验收要求。出货前请核实TGSB现行受监管产品范围和PURA许可证安全要求；从ILAC认可实验室取得IEC 62619型式试验证据。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 截至本數據集日期，甘比亞尚無經確認的引用IEC 62619的獨立強制性BESS產品安全法規；然而，IEC 62619是甘比亞捐助方項目規格和貸款方盡職調查中BESS電芯和模組安全的國際預期技術基準。僅持有中國GB 44240-2024和GB/T 36276-2023認證不足以滿足甘比亞項目驗收要求。出貨前請核實TGSB現行受監管產品範圍和PURA許可證安全要求；從ILAC認可實驗室取得IEC 62619型式試驗證據。

requirement_topic.en: IEC 62933-5-2 Environmental and Functional Safety — Humidity and Temperature Derating for Gambia Tropical Climate
requirement_topic.zh: IEC 62933-5-2环境和功能安全——冈比亚热带气候湿度和温度降额
requirement_topic.zht: IEC 62933-5-2環境和功能安全——甘比亞熱帶氣候濕度和溫度降額

summary.en: IEC 62933-5-2:2020 (Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Safety Requirements — Electrochemical-based systems) addresses system-level environmental and functional safety requirements for BESS, including operating temperature range, humidity limits, and environmental stress considerations. In Gambia's tropical climate — ambient temperatures regularly 30–40°C, relative humidity 60–95% in the rainy season (June–October), and harmattan dust December–March — the environmental conditions exceed the standard IEC 62933-5-2 test conditions (typically 25°C, 40–70% RH) under which Chinese BESS systems are commonly validated. BESS systems deployed in Gambia require: (a) extended operating temperature range documentation (typically -20°C to +55°C for tropical deployment); (b) humidity tolerance testing and IP enclosure rating documentation; (c) thermal management system capacity confirmation for peak Gambia ambient; and (d) BMS fault response configuration for high-temperature and high-humidity conditions. These requirements appear in donor-project technical specifications for West Africa BESS deployments (ECOWAS ROGEP, Jambur 23 MW solar hybrid context) and are expected in PURA licence safety documentation.
summary.zh: IEC 62933-5-2:2020（电气储能系统——安全要求——电化学系统）针对BESS系统级环境和功能安全要求，包括运行温度范围、湿度限值及环境应力考虑。在冈比亚热带气候条件下——环境温度常为30–40°C、雨季（6月至10月）相对湿度60–95%、12月至3月哈马丹粉尘——环境条件超过中国BESS系统通常验证采用的IEC 62933-5-2标准测试条件（通常为25°C、40–70%相对湿度）。在冈比亚部署的BESS系统需要：（a）扩展运行温度范围文件（热带部署通常为-20°C至+55°C）；（b）湿度耐受性测试和机壳IP防护等级文件；（c）冈比亚峰值环境的热管理系统容量确认；（d）高温高湿条件下的BMS故障响应配置。这些要求出现在西非BESS部署的捐助方技术规格中（ECOWAS ROGEP、Jambur 23 MW太阳能混合项目背景），并预期出现在PURA许可证安全文件中。
summary.zht: IEC 62933-5-2:2020（電氣儲能系統——安全要求——電化學系統）針對BESS系統級環境和功能安全要求，包括運行溫度範圍、濕度限值及環境應力考慮。在甘比亞熱帶氣候條件下——環境溫度常為30–40°C、雨季（6月至10月）相對濕度60–95%、12月至3月哈馬丹粉塵——環境條件超過中國BESS系統通常驗證採用的IEC 62933-5-2標準測試條件（通常為25°C、40–70%相對濕度）。在甘比亞部署的BESS系統需要：（a）擴展運行溫度範圍文件（熱帶部署通常為-20°C至+55°C）；（b）濕度耐受性測試和機殼IP防護等級文件；（c）甘比亞峰值環境的熱管理系統容量確認；（d）高溫高濕條件下的BMS故障響應配置。這些要求出現在西非BESS部署的捐助方技術規格中（ECOWAS ROGEP、Jambur 23 MW太陽能混合項目背景），並預期出現在PURA許可證安全文件中。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62933-5-2:2020 — Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Safety Requirements — Electrochemical-based systems (system-level environmental and functional safety; operating temperature, humidity, IP rating requirements)
IEC 62619:2022 — Safety Requirements for Secondary Lithium Cells and Batteries for Use in Industrial Applications (cell/module level thermal and environmental requirements)
IEC 60529 — Degrees of Protection Provided by Enclosures (IP Code) — IP54 minimum, IP65 preferred for Gambia tropical/harmattan dust conditions
ECOWAS ROGEP Technical Specifications — donor-project specifications for West Africa off-grid/hybrid BESS typically mandate IEC 62933-5-2 compliance and tropical climate derating documentation

summary.en: Chinese BESS environmental safety requirements are governed by GB/T 36276-2023 and GB/T 36558-2023, which include operating temperature range and environmental condition specifications. Chinese BESS products are typically tested and validated for China's continental and subtropical climate conditions, which do not fully represent Gambia's hot-humid tropical climate with harmattan dust exposure. Chinese manufacturers must provide additional tropical climate derating documentation, IP rating evidence for humidity and dust, and BMS tropical configuration evidence for Gambia projects. GB/T standards covering environmental performance are not confirmed as accepted equivalents to IEC 62933-5-2 by Gambia donor-project specifications.
summary.zh: 中国BESS环境安全要求由GB/T 36276-2023和GB/T 36558-2023管控，含运行温度范围和环境条件规格。中国BESS产品通常针对中国大陆性和亚热带气候条件进行测试和验证，不能完全代表冈比亚带有哈马丹粉尘暴露的炎热潮湿热带气候。中国制造商须为冈比亚项目提供额外的热带气候降额文件、湿度和粉尘的IP防护等级证据，以及BMS热带配置证据。涵盖环境性能的GB/T标准尚未被冈比亚捐助方项目规格确认为IEC 62933-5-2的等效依据。
summary.zht: 中國BESS環境安全要求由GB/T 36276-2023和GB/T 36558-2023管控，含運行溫度範圍和環境條件規格。中國BESS產品通常針對中國大陸性和亞熱帶氣候條件進行測試和驗證，不能完全代表甘比亞帶有哈馬丹粉塵暴露的炎熱潮濕熱帶氣候。中國製造商須為甘比亞項目提供額外的熱帶氣候降額文件、濕度和粉塵的IP防護等級證據，以及BMS熱帶配置證據。涵蓋環境性能的GB/T標準尚未被甘比亞捐助方項目規格確認為IEC 62933-5-2的等效依據。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 36276-2023 — 电力储能用锂离子电池 (environmental performance requirements for BESS cells and modules)
GB/T 36558-2023 — 电力系统电化学储能系统通用技术条件 (system-level environmental and operating condition requirements)

gap.en: Gap: Chinese BESS products are validated for temperate and subtropical conditions not fully representative of Gambia's tropical climate. Key derating requirements for Gambia: (a) peak ambient temperature 35–40°C — TMS must maintain cell temperature within IEC 62619 operating limits under peak Gambia ambient without derating below contracted energy capacity; (b) high humidity (rainy season >85% RH) — IP54 minimum enclosure rating required; cell-level humidity tolerance evidence from IEC 62619 testing should cover high-humidity conditions; (c) harmattan dust (December–March) — IP54 to IP65 enclosure rating required; filter maintenance schedule must be included in the O&M plan; (d) BMS high-temperature protection thresholds must be recalibrated for Gambia's higher ambient baseline to avoid nuisance trips while maintaining thermal safety margins; (e) IEC 62933-5-2 compliance documentation prepared for China's climate is not automatically valid for Gambia; prepare a Gambia-specific environmental adaptation statement for donor-project and PURA review.
gap.zh: 差距：中国BESS产品按温带和亚热带条件验证，不能完全代表冈比亚热带气候。冈比亚关键降额要求：（a）峰值环境温度35–40°C——TMS须在冈比亚峰值环境温度下将电芯温度维持在IEC 62619运行限值内，且不低于合同储能容量额定值；（b）高湿度（雨季>85%相对湿度）——机壳防护等级最低IP54；IEC 62619测试中的电芯级湿度耐受性证据须覆盖高湿度条件；（c）哈马丹粉尘（12月至3月）——机壳防护等级须达IP54至IP65；过滤器维护计划须纳入运维方案；（d）BMS高温保护阈值须针对冈比亚较高环境基准重新校准，以在维持热安全裕量的同时避免误跳闸；（e）按中国气候准备的IEC 62933-5-2合规文件不自动适用于冈比亚；须为捐助方项目和PURA审查准备冈比亚专项环境适应说明。
gap.zht: 差距：中國BESS產品按溫帶和亞熱帶條件驗證，不能完全代表甘比亞熱帶氣候。甘比亞關鍵降額要求：（a）峰值環境溫度35–40°C——TMS須在甘比亞峰值環境溫度下將電芯溫度維持在IEC 62619運行限值內，且不低於合同儲能容量額定值；（b）高濕度（雨季>85%相對濕度）——機殼防護等級最低IP54；IEC 62619測試中的電芯級濕度耐受性證據須覆蓋高濕度條件；（c）哈馬丹粉塵（12月至3月）——機殼防護等級須達IP54至IP65；過濾器維護計劃須納入運維方案；（d）BMS高溫保護閾值須針對甘比亞較高環境基準重新校準，以在維持熱安全裕量的同時避免誤跳閘；（e）按中國氣候準備的IEC 62933-5-2合規文件不自動適用於甘比亞；須為捐助方項目和PURA審查準備甘比亞專項環境適應說明。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory in donor-project specifications for West Africa BESS deployment; not confirmed as a standalone Gambia regulatory requirement as of dataset date — govern by ECOWAS ROGEP / World Bank / AfDB project specification or verify with PURA
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory under GB/T 36276-2023 and GB/T 36558-2023 for Chinese market; tropical climate derating for Gambia is an additional engineering requirement

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Gambia's hot-humid tropical climate and harmattan dust season require IEC 62933-5-2 environmental safety documentation specifically adapted for tropical conditions — not the same as standard Chinese BESS validation at 25°C / 40–70% RH. Prepare a Gambia-specific environmental adaptation statement covering peak ambient temperature, IP enclosure rating, humidity tolerance, dust ingress protection, and BMS threshold recalibration before submitting to donor-project owner or PURA for review.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 冈比亚炎热潮湿的热带气候和哈马丹粉尘季节要求专门针对热带条件调整的IEC 62933-5-2环境安全文件——与中国BESS在25°C/40–70%相对湿度下的标准验证不同。在提交给捐助方项目业主或PURA审查前，须准备冈比亚专项环境适应说明，涵盖峰值环境温度、机壳IP防护等级、湿度耐受性、防尘侵入保护及BMS阈值重新校准。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 甘比亞炎熱潮濕的熱帶氣候和哈馬丹粉塵季節要求專門針對熱帶條件調整的IEC 62933-5-2環境安全文件——與中國BESS在25°C/40–70%相對濕度下的標準驗證不同。在提交給捐助方項目業主或PURA審查前，須準備甘比亞專項環境適應說明，涵蓋峰值環境溫度、機殼IP防護等級、濕度耐受性、防塵侵入保護及BMS閾值重新校準。

requirement_topic.en: TGSB Conformity Certificate — Gambia Standards Bureau Product Conformity Role for BESS
requirement_topic.zh: TGSB合格证书——冈比亚标准局BESS产品合格评定角色
requirement_topic.zht: TGSB合格證書——甘比亞標準局BESS產品合格評定角色

summary.en: The Gambia Standards Bureau (TGSB — The Gambia Standards Bureau) is the statutory body responsible for standards development, conformity assessment, metrology, and product certification in Gambia, established under the Gambia Standards Act. TGSB has a mandatory pre-shipment conformity assessment programme for selected product categories including electrical and electronic equipment. Whether stationary lithium-ion BESS cells, modules, or complete systems fall within TGSB's current mandatory conformity assessment scope had not been confirmed from publicly accessible TGSB official sources as of the dataset date. This is a high-priority verification gap — if TGSB requires a conformity certificate referencing IEC 62619 (or an equivalent standard) for BESS products before Gambia customs clearance, a TGSB-recognised laboratory test report or Certificate of Conformity (CoC) would be a mandatory import gate. Chinese GB 44240-2024 certificates are unlikely to satisfy a TGSB IEC 62619-referenced CoC requirement without supplementary IEC 62619 test evidence. Exporters should contact TGSB directly before contracting to confirm the current mandatory scope.
summary.zh: 冈比亚标准局（TGSB——冈比亚标准局）是依据《冈比亚标准法》设立的法定机构，负责冈比亚的标准制定、合格评定、计量和产品认证。TGSB对部分产品类别（包括电气和电子设备）实施强制装运前合格评定程序。截至本数据集日期，固定式锂离子BESS电芯、模组或完整系统是否属于TGSB现行强制合格评定范围，尚未从TGSB可公开获取的官方来源得到确认。这是一个高优先级核实差距——若TGSB要求BESS产品在冈比亚海关清关前持有引用IEC 62619（或等效标准）的合格证书，则TGSB认可的实验室测试报告或合格证书（CoC）将成为强制进口门槛。在缺乏补充IEC 62619测试证据的情况下，中国GB 44240-2024证书不大可能满足TGSB IEC 62619引用CoC要求。出口商应在签约前直接联系TGSB，确认现行强制范围。
summary.zht: 甘比亞標準局（TGSB——甘比亞標準局）是依據《甘比亞標準法》設立的法定機構，負責甘比亞的標準制定、合格評定、計量和產品認證。TGSB對部分產品類別（包括電氣和電子設備）實施強制裝運前合格評定程序。截至本數據集日期，固定式鋰離子BESS電芯、模組或完整系統是否屬於TGSB現行強制合格評定範圍，尚未從TGSB可公開獲取的官方來源得到確認。這是一個高優先級核實差距——若TGSB要求BESS產品在甘比亞海關清關前持有引用IEC 62619（或等效標準）的合格證書，則TGSB認可的實驗室測試報告或合格證書（CoC）將成為強制進口門檻。在缺乏補充IEC 62619測試證據的情況下，中國GB 44240-2024證書不大可能滿足TGSB IEC 62619引用CoC要求。出口商應在簽約前直接聯繫TGSB，確認現行強制範圍。

standards_or_laws: Gambia Standards Act — governing legislation for TGSB and mandatory conformity assessment in Gambia
TGSB Mandatory Pre-Shipment Verification Programme — verify current product scope directly with TGSB; BESS-specific mandatory scope unconfirmed as of dataset date
IEC 62619:2022 — likely referenced standard if TGSB has a conformity requirement for BESS products (unconfirmed)

summary.en: Chinese BESS manufacturers typically hold GB 44240-2024 and GB/T 36276-2023 compliance documentation from CNAS-accredited Chinese testing laboratories. These Chinese domestic certificates are not expected to satisfy a TGSB mandatory CoC requirement referencing IEC 62619. If TGSB requires an IEC 62619-based CoC for BESS import into Gambia, the exporter must obtain IEC 62619 test reports from an ILAC-accredited laboratory and apply for TGSB conformity recognition before shipment. Chinese exporters should not assume that GB certification satisfies TGSB requirements without direct confirmation from TGSB.
summary.zh: 中国BESS制造商通常持有来自CNAS认可中国测试实验室的GB 44240-2024和GB/T 36276-2023合规文件。这些中国国内证书预计不能满足TGSB引用IEC 62619的强制CoC要求。若TGSB要求BESS进口冈比亚须持有基于IEC 62619的CoC，出口商须从ILAC认可实验室取得IEC 62619测试报告，并在出货前申请TGSB合格评定认可。中国出口商不应在未直接向TGSB确认的情况下假设GB认证满足TGSB要求。
summary.zht: 中國BESS製造商通常持有來自CNAS認可中國測試實驗室的GB 44240-2024和GB/T 36276-2023合規文件。這些中國國內證書預計不能滿足TGSB引用IEC 62619的強制CoC要求。若TGSB要求BESS進口甘比亞須持有基於IEC 62619的CoC，出口商須從ILAC認可實驗室取得IEC 62619測試報告，並在出貨前申請TGSB合格評定認可。中國出口商不應在未直接向TGSB確認的情況下假設GB認證滿足TGSB要求。

standards_or_laws: GB 44240-2024 — 电化学储能系统用二次锂电池安全要求 (mandatory Chinese BESS cell safety standard; not confirmed as TGSB-accepted equivalent to IEC 62619)
GB/T 36276-2023 — 电力储能用锂离子电池 (voluntary Chinese BESS cell standard)

gap.en: HIGH PRIORITY VERIFICATION GAP: TGSB's mandatory conformity assessment scope for stationary BESS cells and systems has not been confirmed from publicly accessible official sources as of the dataset date. Before contracting or shipping: (a) contact TGSB directly to confirm whether BESS cells, modules, or complete systems require a mandatory TGSB Certificate of Conformity before Gambia customs clearance; (b) if a TGSB CoC is required, determine the referenced standard (expected to be IEC 62619) and the approved laboratory or scheme; (c) allow sufficient lead time for TGSB CoC application and processing in the project schedule; (d) do not assume Chinese GB certificates satisfy TGSB requirements without written confirmation.
gap.zh: 高优先级核实差距：固定式BESS电芯和系统的TGSB强制合格评定范围截至本数据集日期尚未从可公开获取的官方来源得到确认。在签约或出货前：（a）直接联系TGSB，确认BESS电芯、模组或完整系统在冈比亚海关清关前是否需要强制TGSB合格证书；（b）若需要TGSB CoC，确定引用标准（预计为IEC 62619）及认可实验室或方案；（c）在项目计划中为TGSB CoC申请和处理预留充足提前期；（d）未经书面确认，不得假设中国GB证书满足TGSB要求。
gap.zht: 高優先級核實差距：固定式BESS電芯和系統的TGSB強制合格評定範圍截至本數據集日期尚未從可公開獲取的官方來源得到確認。在簽約或出貨前：（a）直接聯繫TGSB，確認BESS電芯、模組或完整系統在甘比亞海關清關前是否需要強制TGSB合格證書；（b）若需要TGSB CoC，確定引用標準（預計為IEC 62619）及認可實驗室或方案；（c）在項目計劃中為TGSB CoC申請和處理預留充足提前期；（d）未經書面確認，不得假設中國GB證書滿足TGSB要求。

mandatory_status.target: Unconfirmed — TGSB mandatory conformity assessment scope for BESS not confirmed from official sources as of dataset date; HIGH PRIORITY to verify directly with TGSB before shipment
mandatory_status.cn: Not applicable — Chinese domestic GB certificates do not satisfy TGSB mandatory CoC requirements; IEC 62619 test evidence from an ILAC-accredited laboratory is required if TGSB mandates conformity certification for BESS

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] TGSB's mandatory conformity assessment scope for stationary BESS in Gambia has not been confirmed from publicly accessible official sources as of the dataset date. This is a high-priority verification gap. Contact TGSB directly before contracting or shipping to confirm whether a TGSB Certificate of Conformity (CoC) referencing IEC 62619 is required for BESS import. Do not assume Chinese GB certificates are accepted — obtain written confirmation from TGSB.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 截至本数据集日期，冈比亚固定式BESS的TGSB强制合格评定范围尚未从可公开获取的官方来源得到确认。这是一个高优先级核实差距。在签约或出货前直接联系TGSB，确认进口BESS是否需要引用IEC 62619的TGSB合格证书（CoC）。不得假设中国GB证书被接受——须取得TGSB书面确认。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 截至本數據集日期，甘比亞固定式BESS的TGSB強制合格評定範圍尚未從可公開獲取的官方來源得到確認。這是一個高優先級核實差距。在簽約或出貨前直接聯繫TGSB，確認進口BESS是否需要引用IEC 62619的TGSB合格證書（CoC）。不得假設中國GB證書被接受——須取得TGSB書面確認。
